creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Who’s ready for the festive season? We are! 🥰🎄❤️

We miss creating content, so here’s a special Christmas greeting for you guys! 

Although we can’t go to crowded winter markets and celebrate outside, we’re thankful we get to feel the Christmas warmth in the comforts of our home. 

Have a very Merry Christmas everyone! 😘

#Christmas #LadyandherSweetEscapes #Dubai #DubaiBlogger #UAEBlogger #DubaiHome #UAE

transcription.text: I don't want a lot for Christmas, there is just one thing I need Don't care about the presents underneath the Christmas tree I don't need to end my shopping there
